title: Shipwright Decision Drop (iterate F3)
description: Shape of a single ADR decision-drop JSON file written by shared/scripts/tools/write_decision_drop.py under <project>/.shipwright/agent_docs/decision-drops/<run_id>_<NNN>.json. Aggregated into decision_log.md at /shipwright-changelog release time by aggregate_decisions.py. Iterate A.3 introduces hard-rejection on the ~500-char per-field budget and the optional spec_ref pointer to .shipwright/planning/adr/<NNN>-<slug>.md.

run_id.description: Iterate run id. Stable across the worktree lifetime; aggregator emits `Run-ID:` line for traceability.

date.description: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) authoring date — preserved on aggregation even if the release runs days later.

title.description: Short ADR title rendered after `### ADR-NNN:`.

context.description: 1-3 sentences explaining why the decision is being made. Hard-rejected at write time if longer; overflow belongs in `spec_ref`.

decision.description: What is being decided. Always present; same length rules as context.

consequences.description: What changes downstream if this decision sticks.

rationale.description: Optional one-liner answering 'why this choice over alternatives'.

rejected.description: Optional list of rejected alternatives (comma-separated or short prose).

commit.description: Commit SHA, when known at F3 time. Aggregator falls back to `(assigned post-merge)` when empty.

architecture_impact.description: Drives the architecture.md / conventions.md follow-up append in aggregate_decisions.py.

spec_ref.description: Optional path (relative to project root) to a long-form ADR spec under `.shipwright/planning/adr/<NNN>-<slug>.md`. Aggregator renders the link as `**Details:** [filename](../planning/adr/...)` underneath the ADR's body bullets.
